dashboard_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 p-6
dashboard_grid.rules: Use col-span-2 for charts, col-span-1 for stats cards. Fill height with h-full.

sidebar.behavior: Sticky sidebar with collapsible functionality on mobile

Card.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border/50 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-md hover:border-indigo-500/20
Card.header: flex flex-row items-center justify-between space-y-0 pb-2

Button.base: rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

Input.base: h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: bg-white/70 dark:bg-slate-950/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/20 dark:border-white/10

gradients.active_item: bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-50 to-transparent dark:from-indigo-950/50 dark:to-transparent border-l-4 border-indigo-500

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Use 'Manrope' for all Headings (h1-h4) and 'Inter' for body text. Import via Google Fonts in index.css.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Implement a 'Bento Grid' layout for the Dashboard: Use a 12-column grid where widgets span different sizes (col-span-3, col-span-6, etc.) to create visual interest.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Theme: Force 'Indigo' as the primary brand color. Do NOT use default blue. Use slate-50/slate-950 for backgrounds to keep it professional.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Components: Customize Shadcn components. Add 'rounded-xl' to Cards and Inputs for a modern feel. Remove sharp corners.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Charts: Use Recharts with the defined palette (Indigo, Emerald, Amber, Rose). Avoid default colors.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Authentication: Create a split-screen login page. Left side: High-res campus image with a dark indigo overlay. Right side: Login form.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Role-Based: Ensure the sidebar menu dynamically changes based on the user role (Admin vs Student vs Faculty).
instructions_to_main_agent.8: Data Tables: Use zebra striping (odd:bg-muted/50) and compact density for Admin lists.
instructions_to_main_agent.9: Accessibility: Ensure all text has sufficient contrast. Use 'sr-only' for icon-only buttons.
instructions_to_main_agent.10: Motion: Add 'transition-all duration-200' to all interactive elements. Use 'hover:-translate-y-1' on dashboard cards.
